{{Infobox character
| name = Eldest
| aliases = The Eldest, Eldest Nye, Eldest (Nye)
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|resurrection technique, materialize out of shadow}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Eldest]], [[Nye Eldest]], faded Nye}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[House]], [[Nye]]}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

''See also: [[Eldest Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The Eldest, also known as Eldest [[Nye]], is the leader of [[the Nye]], a race of beings that appear as bundles of cloth or men wrapped in black garments. Having lived for centuries, the Eldest possesses immense knowledge and significant power, including the ability to move through shadows, glide effortlessly, and manipulate [[essence]]. While many [[Nye]] are bound to [[the House]] of [[Valinhall]], the Eldest's status allows him greater freedom and sight than his kind. He is characterized by a raspy, grating voice and voluminous sleeves that hide his hands and body. The Eldest is driven by a singular goal: the restoration and expansion of [[the House]] of [[Valinhall]]. To achieve this, he seeks to recover the eight lost Dragon's Fangs, collect powerful objects from other [[Territories]], and gather human servants to bolster [[the House]]'s strength. He views this mission as a necessity to prevent his kind from fading into nothingness. In pursuit of these ends, he forms pacts with individuals like the son of [[Kalman]], offering gifts and protection in exchange for service, though he is known to be manipulative and will use force or threats to ensure his objectives are met. He remains deeply loyal to his Master, the [[Incarnation]] of [[Valinhall]], and is prepared to follow their lead or act as a puppet master to ensure [[the House]]'s survival.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Nye Eldest]] is a faded [[Nye]] who wears the black cloak, a garment that serves as a mark of the bargain and represents the mantle of [[the Nye]]. Upon his death, this title is passed down to another successor. During his time in [[the House]], he expressed satisfaction regarding the arrival of new humans. While overseeing these newcomers, he focused his attention on testing the potential of [[Andra]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Eldest]]'s title is passed down to another when he dies.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c9">''House of Blades'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Eldest]] was pleased to have new humans in [[the House]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18">''House of Blades'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Eldest]] was testing [[Andra]]'s potential.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Eldest]] is the [[Nye Eldest]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Eldest]] is a faded [[Nye]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The black cloak is the cloak of [[the Nye]] and a mark of their bargain.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Appearing as a figure in a black hood, the Eldest of [[the Nye]] speaks to [[Kai]] while holding [[Mithra]]. This entity, who possesses the ability to locate a hidden mask, stands in the doorway of the [[workshop]] and harbors desires for the [[Territory]] to expand. Driven by a goal to restore [[Valinhall]], the Eldest may feel anger toward [[Simon]] and would be displeased if he were to leave his cloak behind.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Eldest]] would be unhappy if [[Simon]] left his cloak behind.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Eldest]] is a character in a black hood who speaks to [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Eldest]] of [[the Nye]] holds [[Mithra]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Eldest]] might be angry with [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Eldest]] [[Nye]] seeks the restoration of [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Eldest]] wants the [[Territory]] to grow and expand.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Eldest]] is someone who can find a hidden mask.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Eldest]] was standing in the doorway of the [[workshop]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The Eldest [[Nye]] is a stealthy, hunched figure clad in stormcloud gray robes with hands hidden by voluminous sleeves and a face that appears as a [[void]]. Shorter than most [[Nye]], this entity glides over tiles rather than walking and possesses the ability to materialize from shadows or perform miracles. While the Eldest holds a long-standing connection to [[Valin]] and may have been responsible for his return, the entity is driven by a fear of losing power and an intense desire to expand [[Valinhall]] at any cost. After assigning [[Simon]] various tasks and locking the family in their gallery, the Eldest was seen standing beside [[Kai]] at the Gate before eventually waiting for him in the forge. Throughout these encounters, the Eldest remains a source of fear for [[Simon]], often withholding information and viewing individuals like the two caged human females as valuable pieces in a larger design.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">27</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] [[Nye]] is a character who moves with stealth and grace.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c1">''City of Light'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] [[Nye]] is shorter than most [[Nye]], reaching only [[Simon]]'s shoulder.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] [[Nye]] glides over tiles instead of walking with legs.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] [[Nye]] has hands that are hidden in voluminous sleeves.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] is a character capable of stopping [[Simon]] physically.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5">''City of Light'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] has tasks for [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Valin]] knew the [[Eldest]] [[Nye]] long ago.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] fears losing power.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] stated there were more pressing vacancies to be filled.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] may have brought [[Valin]] back.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] [[Nye]] wears stormcloud gray robes.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] [[Nye]] wears a [[void]] for a face.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] is a character who refuses to tell [[Simon]] everything.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] [[Nye]] has a resurrection technique.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] wants the expansion of [[Valinhall]] at all costs.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] stood before two caged human females.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20">''City of Light'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] is considering whether [[Indirial]] succumbing to his chains is a loss or a gain.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] intends to decide what is to be done about [[Indirial]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] views the two women as valuable pieces.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] [[Nye]] is a hunched figure in dark gray who glides to the Gate.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] is missing.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] [[Nye]] stands beside [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] locked the family in their gallery.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] was waiting for [[Kai]] in the forge.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] is capable of performing miracles.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] is a person [[Simon]] fears.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] can materialize out of shadow.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"That is my title, and now my name. Eldest I am, and Eldest I am called, until my life leaves me and another takes up the title."<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"If the Eldest wants it, he knows right where to find it."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“The Eldest has tasks for me,” Simon said.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“That was the Eldest Nye’s name once, before his title. Forget it. I knew him long ago.”<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|"The Eldest said there were ‘more pressing vacancies to be filled.’"<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Nye]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
